quality_highlights: integrity.md: Exemplary reference with complete configuration table, integrity hierarchy diagram, and precise conformance language
mcp_argument_validation.go: Gold-standard error UX — names unknown param, offers Did-you-mean suggestion, directs to --help; high comment coverage

single_file_improvements.issue: Lines 44-46: run-started ends with trailing '...'; run-success appends 'Clear as crystal! ✨' (informal); run-failure uses ✍️ same as run-started (indistinguishable) and 'Writer's block! ... The page remains blank...' metaphor with no actionable guidance
Deprecation NOTE (lines 12-15) says 'Migrate to the import-based approach shown below' but the next section explains origin, not migration. Add anchor link to #usage within the NOTE itself.
